buildCommand: export CARGO_HOME="$HOME/.cargo" RUSTUP_HOME="$HOME/.rustup" && export PATH="$CARGO_HOME/bin:$PATH" && trunk build --release
installCommand: export CARGO_HOME="$HOME/.cargo" RUSTUP_HOME="$HOME/.rustup" && curl https://sh.rustup.rs -sSf | sh -s -- -y --no-modify-path --default-toolchain stable --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && export PATH="$CARGO_HOME/bin:$PATH" && cargo install --locked trunk
